response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security, embedded switches, or Layer-2/3 protocols essential for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex open-source systems and developer tooling
Demonstrated expertise in low-latency systems and performance optimization
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a mandatory requirement
No experience with network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), switch chips, or embedded firmware

key_factors.factor: No embedded C or Linux kernel experience
